metadata.title: Trail Running Cal
metadata.description: A focused calendar for trail and mountain races in Catalonia.

home.title: Find trail and mountain races across Catalonia.
home.description: Browse a focused race calendar for Barcelona, Girona, Lleida, and Tarragona, built for runners who care about terrain, distance, and elevation.
home.featuredDescription: Starter data is wired through the service and database layers so the page, API, and future clients share the same domain model.
